summary.question: Question:
summary.footer: Please interpret this reading in light of the question above.

coin.subtitle: Coin Oracle
coin.title: Quick Divination
coin.yangMsg: The coin says yes. The way is open — proceed with confidence.
coin.yinMsg: The coin counsels no. Pause and reconsider before acting.
coin.footer: Please interpret this result in light of your question.

shengjiao.subtitle: Moon Blocks Divination
shengjiao.title: 掷筊问卜
shengjiao.shengMsg: The oracle grants Sheng — a clear yes. Your wish is favorable and the way is open.
shengjiao.xiaoMsg: The oracle grants Xiao — divine will is unclear. Please toss again.
shengjiao.yinMsg: The oracle grants Yin — a no. It is best to pause and reconsider.
shengjiao.footer: Please interpret this result in light of your question.

xlr.subtitle: Six Signs Oracle
xlr.title: 小六壬
xlr.questionPlaceholder: Ask about the matter you wish to know…
xlr.footer: Please interpret this reading in light of your question.

0.name: Great Peace
0.desc: All matters are secure and auspicious. Plans succeed, travel is safe, the ill recover, and lost items are found.

1.name: Lingering
1.desc: Matters are entangled and unresolved. Hard to advance or retreat. Lost items are hard to find. Wait patiently.

2.name: Quick Joy
2.desc: Good news arrives quickly. Helpful people appear. Plans succeed and wealth is attainable. All matters are auspicious.

3.name: Red Mouth
3.desc: Arguments and disputes arise. Legal trouble is possible. Speak carefully, avoid conflict. Better to stay still than act.

4.name: Small Fortune
4.desc: Moderately auspicious. Minor obstacles exist but plans can succeed. Start small and proceed steadily. Gains will come.

5.name: Void
5.desc: Matters come to nothing. Lost items cannot be recovered. Illness faces difficulty. Wait quietly — do not act rashly.

mhy.subtitle: Plum Blossom Numerology
mhy.title: 梅花易術
mhy.questionPlaceholder: Enter the matter you wish to divine…
mhy.footer: Please interpret this reading in light of your question.

d6.subtitle: Da Liu Ren Divination
d6.title: Da Liu Ren
d6.birthPlaceholder: Enter your birth date and time…
d6.footer: Please interpret this reading in light of your question.

000000.name: The Receptive
000000.title: Earth / Earth
000000.judgment: Sublime success, furthering through the perseverance of a mare.

100010.name: Difficulty at the Beginning
100010.title: Water / Thunder
100010.judgment: Sublime success. Perseverance furthers. Do not set out; it furthers to appoint helpers.

010001.name: Youthful Folly
010001.title: Mountain / Water
010001.judgment: It is not I who seek the young fool; the young fool seeks me.

111010.name: Waiting
111010.title: Water / Heaven
111010.judgment: If you are sincere, you have light and success. Perseverance brings good fortune.

010111.name: Conflict
010111.title: Heaven / Water
010111.judgment: You are sincere but obstructed. A cautious halt partway brings good fortune; going through to the end brings misfortune.

010000.name: The Army
010000.title: Earth / Water
010000.judgment: The army needs perseverance and a strong man. Good fortune without blame.

000010.name: Holding Together
000010.title: Water / Earth
000010.judgment: Good fortune. Inquire of the oracle whether you possess sublimity, constancy, and perseverance; then there is no blame.

111011.name: Small Taming
111011.title: Wind / Heaven
111011.judgment: Success. Dense clouds, no rain from our western region.

110111.name: Treading
110111.title: Heaven / Lake
110111.judgment: Treading upon the tail of the tiger; it does not bite the man. Success.

111000.name: Peace
111000.title: Earth / Heaven
111000.judgment: The small departs, the great approaches. Good fortune and success.

000111.name: Standstill
000111.title: Heaven / Earth
000111.judgment: Evil people do not further the perseverance of the superior man. The great departs; the small approaches.

101111.name: Fellowship
101111.title: Heaven / Fire
101111.judgment: Fellowship with men in the open. Success. It furthers to cross the great water.

001000.name: Modesty
001000.title: Earth / Mountain
001000.judgment: Success. The superior man carries things through.

000100.name: Enthusiasm
000100.title: Thunder / Earth
000100.judgment: It furthers to install helpers and to set armies marching.

100110.name: Following
100110.title: Lake / Thunder
100110.judgment: Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. No blame.

011001.name: Work on the Spoiled
011001.title: Mountain / Wind
011001.judgment: Supreme success. It furthers to cross the great water. Before the starting point, three days; after, three days.

110000.name: Approach
110000.title: Earth / Lake
110000.judgment: Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. When the eighth month comes, there will be misfortune.

000011.name: Contemplation
000011.title: Wind / Earth
000011.judgment: The ablution has been made, but not yet the offering. Full of trust they look up to him.

100101.name: Biting Through
100101.title: Fire / Thunder
100101.judgment: Success. It furthers to let justice be administered.

101001.name: Grace
101001.title: Mountain / Fire
101001.judgment: Success. In small matters it furthers one to undertake something.

000001.name: Splitting Apart
000001.title: Mountain / Earth
000001.judgment: It does not further one to go anywhere.

100000.name: Return
100000.title: Earth / Thunder
100000.judgment: Success. Going out and coming in without error. Friends come without blame.

100111.name: Innocence
100111.title: Heaven / Thunder
100111.judgment: Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. If someone is not as they should be, misfortune follows.

111001.name: Great Taming
111001.title: Mountain / Heaven
111001.judgment: Perseverance furthers. Not eating at home brings good fortune. It furthers to cross the great water.

100001.name: Nourishment
100001.title: Mountain / Thunder
100001.judgment: Perseverance brings good fortune. Pay heed to the providing of nourishment.

011110.name: Great Preponderance
011110.title: Lake / Wind
011110.judgment: The ridgepole sags. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. Success.

010010.name: The Abysmal
010010.title: Water / Water
010010.judgment: The Abysmal repeated. If you are sincere, you have success in your heart.

101101.name: The Clinging
101101.title: Fire / Fire
101101.judgment: Perseverance furthers. Success. Care for the cow brings good fortune.

001110.name: Influence
001110.title: Lake / Mountain
001110.judgment: Success. Perseverance furthers. Taking a maiden to wife brings good fortune.

011100.name: Duration
011100.title: Thunder / Wind
011100.judgment: Success. No blame. Perseverance furthers. It furthers to have somewhere to go.

001111.name: Retreat
001111.title: Heaven / Mountain
001111.judgment: Success. In what is small, perseverance furthers.

000101.name: Progress
000101.title: Fire / Earth
000101.judgment: The powerful prince is honored with horses in large numbers. In a single day he is granted audience three times.

101000.name: Darkening of the Light
101000.title: Earth / Fire
101000.judgment: In adversity it furthers one to be persevering.

101011.name: The Family
101011.title: Wind / Fire
101011.judgment: The perseverance of the woman furthers.

001010.name: Obstruction
001010.title: Water / Mountain
001010.judgment: The southwest furthers. The northeast does not further. It furthers to see the great man. Perseverance brings good fortune.

010100.name: Deliverance
010100.title: Thunder / Water
010100.judgment: The southwest furthers. If there is no longer anything where one has to go, return brings good fortune.

110001.name: Decrease
110001.title: Mountain / Lake
110001.judgment: Decrease combined with sincerity brings supreme good fortune. No blame. One may be persevering.

100011.name: Increase
100011.title: Wind / Thunder
100011.judgment: It furthers one to undertake something. It furthers one to cross the great water.

111110.name: Breakthrough
111110.title: Lake / Heaven
111110.judgment: One must resolutely make the matter known at the court of the king. It must be announced truthfully. Danger.

011111.name: Coming to Meet
011111.title: Heaven / Wind
011111.judgment: The maiden is powerful. One should not marry such a maiden.

000110.name: Gathering Together
000110.title: Lake / Earth
000110.judgment: Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers to see the great man. Perseverance furthers.

011000.name: Pushing Upward
011000.title: Earth / Wind
011000.judgment: Supreme success. One must see the great man. Fear not. Departure toward the south brings good fortune.

010110.name: Oppression
010110.title: Lake / Water
010110.judgment: Success. Perseverance. The great man brings good fortune. No blame. When one has something to say, it is not believed.

011010.name: The Well
011010.title: Water / Wind
011010.judgment: The town may be changed, but the well cannot be changed. It neither decreases nor increases.

101110.name: Revolution
101110.title: Lake / Fire
101110.judgment: On your own day you are believed. Supreme success, furthering through perseverance. Remorse disappears.

100100.name: The Arousing
100100.title: Thunder / Thunder
100100.judgment: Thunder brings success. Thunder comes—boom! Laughing words—ha-ha! The thunder terrifies for a hundred miles.

001001.name: Keeping Still
001001.title: Mountain / Mountain
001001.judgment: Keeping his back still so that he no longer feels his body. He goes into his courtyard and does not see his people. No blame.

001011.name: Development
001011.title: Wind / Mountain
001011.judgment: The maiden is given in marriage. Good fortune. Perseverance furthers.

110100.name: The Marrying Maiden
110100.title: Thunder / Lake
110100.judgment: Undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that would further.

101100.name: Abundance
101100.title: Thunder / Fire
101100.judgment: Success. The king attains abundance. Be not sad. Be like the sun at midday.

001101.name: The Wanderer
001101.title: Fire / Mountain
001101.judgment: Success through smallness. Perseverance brings good fortune to the wanderer.

011011.name: The Gentle
011011.title: Wind / Wind
011011.judgment: Success through what is small. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. It furthers one to see the great man.

010011.name: Dispersion
010011.title: Wind / Water
010011.judgment: Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.

110010.name: Limitation
110010.title: Water / Lake
110010.judgment: Success. Galling limitation must not be persevered in.

110011.name: Inner Truth
110011.title: Wind / Lake
110011.judgment: Pigs and fishes. Good fortune. It furthers to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.

001100.name: Small Preponderance
001100.title: Thunder / Mountain
001100.judgment: Success. Perseverance furthers. Small things may be done; great things should not be done.

101010.name: After Completion
101010.title: Water / Fire
101010.judgment: Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune, at the end disorder.

010101.name: Before Completion
010101.title: Fire / Water
010101.judgment: Success. But if the little fox, after nearly completing the crossing, gets his tail in the water, there is nothing that would further.

unknown.name: Unknown
unknown.title: Unknown
unknown.judgment: This hexagram is not in the database.
